title: MarketEvent
description: Single market data event from exchange or replay stream. Represents a tick, trade, quote, or order book update.

timestamp_ns.description: Exchange timestamp in nanoseconds since Unix epoch.

receive_timestamp_ns.description: Local receive timestamp in nanoseconds since Unix epoch.

last_price.description: Last trade price. Null if not a trade event.

last_volume.description: Last trade volume (number of contracts/lots). Null if not a trade event.

bid_price.description: Best bid price. Null if not available.

bid_volume.description: Best bid volume. Null if not available.

ask_price.description: Best ask price. Null if not available.

ask_volume.description: Best ask volume. Null if not available.

spread.description: Bid-ask spread. Null if bid or ask not available.

mid_price.description: Mid price = (bid + ask) / 2. Null if bid or ask not available.

order_book_depth.description: Number of price levels in order book snapshot. Null if not an orderbook_update.

trading_halted.description: True if trading is halted on this instrument.

source.description: Data source identifier (e.g. moex_ct, replay, paper).

sequence_number.description: Monotonic sequence number for ordering. Null if not available.
